title: Chinese AI model Kimi K3 reaches first place in Frontend Code Arena and causes global stir
summary: Moonshot AI presents the largest open-source model, directly competing with the closed models from OpenAI and Anthropic.

title: Apple sues OpenAI and threatens to delay its initial public offering
summary: The company sends legal letters to dozens of OpenAI employees in a battle that puts its IPO at risk.

title: Bethesda confirms remasters of Fallout 3 and New Vegas and development of Fallout 5
summary: The video game company announces plans to revitalize the post-apocalyptic saga with new installments and improved versions.

title: Arrested in Florida for stealing $220,000 in cryptocurrencies through malware in Steam games
summary: The accused infected 8,000 devices with trojans hidden in popular titles, according to the FBI.

title: TSMC will invest an additional $100 billion to build four factories in Arizona
summary: The total investment of the Taiwanese manufacturer in the United States amounts to $265 billion, focused on 2nm technology.

title: Intel will name its Nova Lake processors Core Ultra 400 and release them in stages
summary: Leaks suggest that the 52-core flagship will not arrive until late 2027.

title: AMD Ryzen 7 7700X3D offered in exclusive bundle on Newegg with motherboard and RAM for $450
summary: The bundle includes a 31% discount and is designed for compact high-performance builds.

title: GPD Win Max 3 confirmed with 110W AMD Strix Halo processor and 165Hz OLED display
summary: The handheld console promises to be the most powerful, with an Arc G3 Extreme variant also in development.

title: LG installs unauthorized software on its monitors through Windows Update, according to Gamers Nexus complaint
summary: Monitoring software is installed without permission and could compromise user privacy.

title: Amazon corrects a billing error that generated charges of up to $1.7 billion for AWS customers
summary: A flaw in the cost estimation system caused inflated invoices that the company is rectifying.

title: Mario Kart Wii comes to PC via static recompilation with 4K support and over 200 tracks
summary: The fan project uses artificial intelligence to port the game for the first time, offering unlimited frame rates.

title: China promotes DeepSeek as its champion in the artificial intelligence war against the United States
summary: The Asian country bets on its own AI ecosystem to compete with Western technologies.

title: Linus Torvalds responds to critics of AI in the Linux kernel with a blunt 'go fry asparagus'
summary: The creator of Linux defends the integration of artificial intelligence tools in kernel development.

title: Netflix produces 300 projects with artificial intelligence, marking a milestone in the adoption of technology in entertainment
summary: The streaming platform accelerates the integration of AI in its content, reflecting an unstoppable trend in the industry.

title: The European Union forces Google to allow rival assistants to access Android's microphone and camera
summary: The antitrust decision aims to level the playing field for third-party AI assistants on Android devices.

title: Australia requires AI data centers to generate as much energy as they consume to be sustainable
summary: The Australian Prime Minister presents a national framework for AI that includes energy efficiency and data protection.

title: US lawmakers want to ban Chinese memory chips from allied supply chains due to security risk
summary: The proposed law considers that dependence on Chinese memory poses an unacceptable risk to national security.

title: San Francisco demands Apple and Google remove from their stores AI apps that undress people
summary: Authorities argue that these apps violate privacy by generating intimate images without consent.

title: San Francisco mayor proposes stricter regulations for robotaxis after incident with Waymo
summary: A Waymo autonomous vehicle became disoriented by smoke, causing traffic chaos and demanding greater control.

title: SpaceX aborts launch of second Starship V3 seconds after ignition
summary: The space company cancels the launch of the mega-rocket due to an anomaly, postponing the test with no new date.
